language-designer-ai-assistant-descripti: The description text displayed below the heading in the assistant. This text provides additional context about the assistant's capabilities and how users can interact with it.
language-designer-ai-assistant-entry-mes: The instructions to display when the assistant is first loaded. This is intended to be a welcome or entry message that provides guidance to users on how to interact with the assistant.
language-designer-ai-assistant-heading-d: The heading text displayed at the top of the assistant. This name should be concise and descriptive of the assistant's purpose.
language-designer-ai-assistant-suggested: Enter a sample question or directive
Prompts to suggest to the end user on load. These are intended to help users understand which questions they can ask.
